properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Faith of our fathers! living still In spite of dungeon, fire and sword; Oh how our hearts beat high with joy Whene'er we hear that glorious word

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Faith of our fathers, holy faith! We will be true to thee till death!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Our fathers, chained in prisons dark, Were still in heart and conscience free: How sweet would be their children's fate, If they, like them, could die for Thee!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Faith of our fathers! we will love Both friend and foe in all our strife; And preach Thee, too, As love knows how, By kindly words and virtuous life!
